subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! Place thy trust in the protection, aid and shelter of the Lord, and rely thou upon Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذبه بنفحات الله امیدوار بصون و عون و حمایت حضرت پروردگار باش و متوکل بر
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @high station of the true believer, @firmness in the Covenant, @thankfulness; gratitude
